subject: feat(chart): replace drag-to-zoom with timeline preset buttons
body:
Disabled x-axis zoom. Added 1W/1M/3M/6M/1Y/All preset buttons that
set xaxis min as a lookback from today. Forecast (future data) is
always visible. Right-aligned next to the cumulative/daily toggle.

Tags: chart, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard
Semver: minor
